role: This directory aggregates all test suites for the ArchSpine mirror system, covering unit and integration tests for core utilities, CLI governance, error handling, footprint calculation, manifest persistence, distributed locking, security boundaries, semantic drift detection, and spine gate infrastructure.
responsibility: Collectively, the test suites in this directory verify the correctness, robustness, and integration of ArchSpine’s key modules, ensuring that synchronization, governance, error propagation, structural analysis, database persistence, concurrency, security isolation, drift detection, and mutation detection all behave as specified, providing a comprehensive regression guard for the entire system.

children.role: Unit test suite for the agent-instructions synchronization utility module.
Unit test suite for the build script's dist packaging exclusion filter
Integration test suite validating the demo project's governance lifecycle using the built CLI and core services.
Test suite for the error system convergence, validating that error types propagate correctly through CheckService, FixService, MCP tools, and other core infrastructure components.
Unit test suite for the structural and semantic footprint calculation utilities in the ArchSpine infrastructure layer.
Vitest test suite covering Manifest persistence and SpineDB batch commit integration.
Vitest integration test suite for the distributed lock worker (lock-worker.mjs), validating cross-process acquire, release, and payload rewrite semantics.
Test support module providing isolated filesystem and dependency mocking helpers for CLI security boundary tests.
Integration test suite for the semantic drift detection feature of the ArchSpine mirror system.
Vitest test suite for the Spine Gate infrastructure module, verifying protected output mutation detection and baseline writing integrity.
